case_title: HSBC BANK USA, N.A., AS TRUSTEE FOR THE HOLDERS OF VS. JEANNETTE ELARMS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK USA, N.A., AS TRUSTEE FOR THE HOLDERS OF DEUTSCHE ALT---A SECURITIES MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST, SERIES 2007--OA2 MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELARMS, JEANNETTE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 500 PLYMOUTH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK USA, N.A., AS TRUSTEE FOR THE HOLDERS OF DEUTSCHE ALT---A SECURITIES MORTGAGE LOAN TRUST, SERIES 2007--OA2 MORTGAGE PASS-THROUGH CERTIFICATES AS TO DEFENDANT ELARMS, JEANNETTE DOES I THROUGH X, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ELARMS, JEANNETTE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ELARMS, JEANNETTE
